name_cn:
❤️Black Lamb Gold
Lady's latest micro series, a bag that can't hold much, only fits cute little bags 😘, made of soft lamb skin, iconic letter hardware buckle, exquisite bag shape 👏🏻, simple and stylish, versatile, small capacity, can only hold lipstick and car keys, also works as a card holder 🤗
size:12*10*5cm
6601
